option_a_candidate_set_rerank.match_to_bottleneck: high: listwise next-step ranking directly targets branch selection and reduces strict dependence on binary pair labels

option_b_rerank_fallback_for_ambiguous.match_to_bottleneck: high for ambiguity slices; lower direct coverage on easy states

option_c_embeddings_case_retrieval.match_to_bottleneck: medium; indirect to branch-selection objective and needs retrieval corpus design

option_d_other.match_to_bottleneck: not selected; no cleaner minimal path than rerank in current repo layout

rationale: Most direct listwise baseline against pairwise controllers with minimal repo changes; option B also executed as supportive fallback variant for ambiguity slices.
